name: Generate compliance audit document in Iteration Layer

parameters.content:
## Generate a Compliance Audit Document

Compliance agencies and internal audit teams use this recipe to generate standardized audit documents — with structured findings tables, risk classifications, and remediation timelines.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Generate Audit Document
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.
